summary: Microsoft Teams configuration flow bug fix verified. Backend: 20/20 tests pass. Frontend: All 3 user scenarios verified (delegated, application, clean). All features working correctly.

backend: test_teams_has_configured_field - Teams provider has 'configured' field (False with datetime-debug placeholder)
test_teams_has_features_field - Teams has 'features' array with create_meeting and fetch_attendance
test_delegated_user_email_from_outlook - Clara's Teams email comes from Outlook connection
test_connect_teams_saves_azure_user_id - POST /api/video-evidence/connect/teams saves Azure AD User ID
test_connect_teams_sets_application_mode - Connect via form sets connection_mode='application'
frontend: Clara (delegated): Teams avancé activé banner visible
Clara (delegated): Shows 'Les réunions Teams sont créées sous votre propre identité Microsoft'
Rémi (application): Teams card shows 'Via identifiant Azure AD (mode application)'
Rémi (application): Amber warning about server credentials not configured
Louis (clean): Teams card shows 'Configurer Microsoft Teams' button
Louis (clean): Form shows flow clarification note about recommended delegated method
Louis (clean): Form shows amber warning about server credentials
Louis (clean): Azure ID input field present

GET /api/video-evidence/provider-status.teams.unavailable_reason: Identifiant enregistré, mais les credentials Azure serveur ne sont pas configurés...
Configurez votre compte Teams ci-dessous ou activez Teams avancé via Outlook.

seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo users with pre-configured Teams connections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Teams configuration flow bug fix verified. Key features: (1) provider-status returns 'configured', 'features', 'connection_mode' for Teams, (2) is_configured() validates UUID format and rejects placeholder values like 'datetime-debug', (3) connection_mode='delegated' for Outlook scope users, 'application' for Azure AD form users, null when not connected, (4) can_auto_generate=true for delegated mode (uses user's own token), false for application mode when server not configured, (5) Frontend shows appropriate UI for each mode: delegated shows 'Teams avancé activé', application shows 'Via identifiant Azure AD (mode application)' with warning, clean shows form with flow clarification note. Test users: Clara (delegated), Rémi (application), Louis (clean).
